planSteps.description: The form page loads with title 'Report a Sighting'
The form has fields: Your Name, Species, Location, Notes
Fill in 'Your Name' field with 'Test User'
Select 'Sumatran Tiger' from the Species dropdown
Fill in 'Location' field with 'Test Location, Indonesia'
Fill in 'Notes' field with 'Test sighting for hackathon validation'
